vocab.meaning: niềm vui sướng không kìm nén được
vocab.example: I remember the unbridled glee I felt every time my father started the engine for a summer road trip.

vocab.meaning: sự rung động có nhịp điệu
vocab.example: The rhythmic vibration of the vehicle on the gravel road often had a hypnotic effect on me as a child.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác buồn nôn (khác với cụm motion sickness)
vocab.example: To be honest, I didn't always enjoy car rides because of the nauseating sensation caused by the lack of fresh air.

vocab.meaning: nhận thức về không gian/vị trí
vocab.example: Traveling by car helped develop my spatial awareness as I tried to track our progress on a physical atlas.

vocab.meaning: cuộc phiêu lưu gián tiếp (qua quan sát)
vocab.example: Watching the lives of strangers in passing towns provided a sense of vicarious adventure from the safety of the rear seat.

vocab.meaning: sự thay đổi về địa hình
vocab.example: I was fascinated by the rapid topographical change, shifting from coastal plains to jagged mountain peaks within hours.
Long journeys in an old car with stagnant air were quite taxing, making me yearn for the destination.
Driving through the countryside at dawn revealed ethereal landscapes draped in thick, silver mist.

vocab.meaning: phản hồi xúc giác (cảm giác bề mặt)
vocab.example: I used to love the tactile feedback of the bumpy country lanes; it made the journey feel much more like an escapade.

vocab.meaning: sự biến dạng về thời gian (cảm giác thời gian trôi khác đi)
vocab.example: As a kid, long drives induced a kind of temporal distortion where ten minutes felt like an eternity of boredom.
